parameter_description: Selects the program bank (paired with CC 32 and a Program Change)
notes: Value 0 selects the Program area; value 32 selects Timbre or Drum Kit areas. Must be followed by CC 32 and a Program Change
usage: 0: Program A-P; 32: Timbre or Drum Kit

parameter_description: Selects the program bank (paired with CC 0 and a Program Change)
notes: Value pairs with CC 0 to pick bank. With MSB 0: 0 selects banks A-H, 1 selects banks I-P. With MSB 32: 32-39 select Timbre 1-4, 64 selects Drum Kit
usage: 0: Banks A-H; 1: Banks I-P; 32: Timbre 1; 33: Timbre 1 preset; 34: Timbre 2; 35: Timbre 2 preset; 36: Timbre 3; 37: Timbre 3 preset; 38: Timbre 4; 39: Timbre 4 preset; 64: Drum Kit

parameter_description: Modulation wheel depth (controls LFO2 vibrato intensity by default)
Breath controller depth (assignable pedal can also drive it)

notes: Default CC for the assignable switch when set to Damper
Default CC for the assignable switch when set to PortSw
Default CC sent when the assignable switch is set to FootSw. Conflicts with the default Filter 2 keyboard track knob assignment
Receive only

parameter_description: Resets all continuous controllers to their default values
notes: Receive only
Receive only

parameter_description: Sets the Timbre to receive on its MIDI channel only
notes: Receive only

parameter_description: Sets the Timbre to receive on any MIDI channel
notes: Receive only

parameter_description: Turns the Unison voice mode on or off

usage: 0-13: Saw; 14-27: Square; 28-41: Triangle; 42-55: Sine; 56-69: Formant; 70-83: Noise; 84-97: Synth PCM; 98-111: Drum PCM; 112-127: Audio in

parameter_description: Oscillator 1 primary control (waveform, pulse width, cross depth, detune, VPM depth, formant width, resonance, or gain depending on the wave and modulation type)
Oscillator 1 secondary control (LFO modulation intensity, unison phase, carrier harmonics, formant shift, LPF-HPF balance, or wave select depending on the wave and modulation type)

usage: 0-31: Off; 32-63: Ring; 64-95: Sync; 96-127: Ring plus sync

parameter_description: Oscillator 2 pitch offset in semitones relative to oscillator 1
notes: Non-linear gradient maps to -24 to +24 semitones

parameter_description: Noise generator level into the mixer
Configures how the two filters are connected
Continuously blends filter 1 between LPF24, LPF12, HPF, BPF, and THRU
notes: Set to 0 for LPF24 and 127 for THRU; intermediate values blend between filter types
usage: 0: LPF24; 1~30: LPF24 to LPF12 blend; 31-33: LPF12; 34~62: LPF12 to HPF blend; 63-65: HPF; 66~94: HPF to BPF blend; 95-97: BPF; 98~126: BPF to THRU blend; 127: THRU

parameter_description: Amount that EG 1 modulates the filter 1 cutoff
Amount that note number tracks filter 1 cutoff
notes: Non-linear gradient maps to -2.00 to +2.00 tracking ratio

parameter_description: Amount that EG 1 modulates the filter 2 cutoff
Amount that note number tracks filter 2 cutoff
notes: Shares CC 82 with the default assignable foot switch; reassign one if both are needed

parameter_description: Amp section output level (also receives MIDI Volume)
Amp section stereo position (also receives MIDI Pan)
Selects the drive or waveshape mode

usage: 0-31: Saw; 32-63: Square; 64-95: Triangle; 96-127: Sample and hold

parameter_description: LFO 1 rate (free or tempo-synced depending on program setting)
notes: Mapping depends on the LFO Tempo Sync setting; tempo-synced mode maps values to note divisions from 8-1 to 1-64

usage: 0-31: Saw; 32-63: Square; 64-95: Triangle; 96-127: Sample and hold

parameter_description: LFO 2 rate (free or tempo-synced depending on program setting)
notes: Mapping depends on the LFO Tempo Sync setting; tempo-synced mode maps values to note divisions from 8-1 to 1-64
